About Programs Admissions Contact Give

Admissions

Every child belongs here.

A liberatory education should be available to every family — not just those who can afford it.

No family will be turned away.

80% of Pear Tree families receive financial aid. We offer a sliding scale based on each family's situation because we believe access to excellent education is a right, not a privilege.

  • → 80% of families receive need-based financial aid
  • → Sliding scale tuition based on ability to pay
  • → No family has ever been turned away due to inability to pay
  • → BASIC Fund scholarships available (up to $2,750/year per child)

Programs & schedules.

Ages 2+

Preschool

Hours
8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Days
Monday – Friday
Campus
8100 Winthrope Street

Grades TK – 5th

Elementary

Hours
8:30 AM – 3:30 PM
Days
Monday – Friday
Campus
6925 Chabot Road

How To Join

Four steps to your child's education.

1

Schedule a Tour

Visit our campus, meet our teachers, and see Montessori in action. Tours are the best way to experience what makes Pear Tree different.

2

Submit an Application

Complete the application form and share your family's story with us. We review each application holistically — there are no test scores or academic prerequisites.

3

Financial Aid Conversation

We'll work with every family to find a tuition level that works. Our commitment to access means we will find a way.

4

Welcome to Pear Tree

Once accepted, you'll join a community of families who are invested in building something different together.

What families say

A community, on purpose.

"The thoughtfulness, creativity and love of the teachers — staff really "see" each child and support healthy peer relationships."

— Current Parent · Berkeley Parents Network

"Students develop deep understanding of the foundational principles from the Montessori materials and excel at applying learning to real-world contexts."

— Current Parent · Berkeley Parents Network

"The school creates an inclusive and caring learning environment where children develop confidence and emotional expression."

— Current Parent · Berkeley Parents Network

"The community has unprecedented love and support among families and staff."

— Current Parent · Berkeley Parents Network

Ready to learn more?

Schedule a campus tour to see our classrooms, meet our teachers, and learn how Pear Tree can be the right fit for your family.

Schedule a Tour Call (510) 817-4690

Pear Tree Community School

A social justice Montessori school in Oakland serving preschool through 5th grade. No family will be turned away.

Campuses

8100 Winthrope St (Preschool)

6925 Chabot Rd (Elementary)
